title: Accept expected enforced preflight in adoption smoke
outOfScope: Changing enforced preflight behavior or weakening fail-closed adoption governance.
Changing release metadata or the public release workflow.

sources.reason: Recognizes an expected enforced preflight stop after creating the configuration Work Item.
Covers the fail-closed configuration smoke behavior.
Defines the release-distribution smoke gate that exposed the mismatch.

riskAssessment.reason: The change only classifies an expected fail-closed preflight result; it does not permit implementation or finish.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized serial remediation and automatic PR/branch lifecycle closure.

preReviewWarnings: Verify the smoke check remains fail-closed and only accepts the expected configuration preflight stop.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The adoption smoke check accepts the expected enforced preflight stop only after the configuration Work Item is created.
Unexpected command failures or missing configuration evidence remain failures.
A regression test covers the fail-closed result and passes with the fix.
Full project and AI governance checks pass.
guidelines: Preserve fail-closed preflight behavior and require observable configuration evidence.
Do not treat an expected stop as successful implementation or finish.

intent.problem: After v0.5.33 publication, release-distribution smoke correctly stops a new adopter configuration Work Item at enforced preflight, but the checker incorrectly reports that expected stop as Work Item creation failure.
constraints: Do not weaken enforced preflight or allow a not_ready Work Item into implementation.
Require the configuration Contract, Summary, and start receipt before accepting the expected stop.
intent.rationale: The smoke gate must distinguish a verified fail-closed boundary from an unexpected command failure.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Configuration Work Item is created, preflight stops at not_ready, and required evidence exists.
Missing evidence or an unexpected command failure remains a smoke failure.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized automatic serial remediation, PR merge, release, and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
